title: Italian Crepes with Fresh Fruit
description: Thin Italian crepes filled with a sweet and tangy mix of fresh berries and topped with whipped cream. A light and delicious dessert perfect for warm evenings.
instructions: Prepare the crepes according to the package instructions.
In a large bowl, mix together the fresh berries, powdered sugar, and lemon juice.
Fill each crepe with the berry mixture and fold in half.
Serve the crepes warm with whipped cream, if desired.
Garnish with additional fresh berries, if desired.
